---
title: "Doing Stupid things in jetlag- A study proves this"
date: "2010-11-17"
slug: "doing-stupid-things-in-jetlag-a-study-proves-this"
categories: ["HEALTH &amp; SPIRITUALITY"]
tags: ["Jet Lag", "Stupid"]
featured_image: "/images/2010/11/339.jpg"
draft: false
---

![](data:image/jpg;base64,)

In addition to making you groggy and dazed, jet lag may make you stupid. A study presented November 15 at the annual Society for Neuroscience meeting finds that hamsters suffering extreme, chronic jet lag had about half the normal rate of new neuron birth in a part of the brain. What
